title: TikTok Ads Scraper
description: Extract ad metadata from one or more TikTok Creative Center ad URLs.

urls.title: TikTok Creative Center Ad URLs
urls.description: One or more TikTok Creative Center ad URLs. The actor pushes one dataset item for each requested ad URL.

url.title: Single TikTok Creative Center Ad URL
url.description: Legacy single URL field for API callers. Ignored when TikTok Creative Center Ad URLs is provided.
